description: Design a vertical employee ID badge for 'Nexus Dynamics' with custom dimensions of 2.13 inches width and 3.38 inches height. The badge should feature a bold header 'NEXUS DYNAMICS', a photo placeholder in the upper center, and a blue footer bar. Include employee details for 'Alex Mercer' (Title: 'Systems Architect', ID: 'ND-8942') and a QR code containing the text 'ND-8942'. Save the native file to /home/ga/Documents/nexus_id_badge.eddx and export the design as a PNG image to /home/ga/Documents/nexus_id_badge.png.
